name: io.github.yolfinance/yolfi-agent
title: Yolfi Payments MCP
description: Let AI agents add Yolfi crypto checkout, paylinks, webhooks, and status checks.

environmentVariables.name: YOLFI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Explicit environment credentials take precedence over the protected credential stored by yolfi setup/checkin. Private API tools require one of these credentials.

environmentVariables.name: YOLFI_WEBHOOK_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for webhook verification in CI or deployed environments. Local create/rotate tools otherwise use endpoint-specific secrets from the protected Yolfi config.
